title: Citywire - ‘Clients are already topping up,’ says Blackhorn’s Lee on UBP hedge fund
body:
Citywire - ‘Clients are already topping up,’ says Blackhorn’s Lee on UBP hedge fund

  • Nov 7, 2024
  • 1 min read

Blackhorn Wealth Management is proud to announce its strategic distribution deal with UBP, offering clients enhanced access to high-quality hedge funds. This partnership, established in January, introduces a new hedge fund-of-funds, providing our high- and ultra-high-net-worth clients with exposure to both established and emerging hedge funds.


Alan Lee, Head of Investment Strategy at Blackhorn, noted the growing client interest and allocations to hedge funds, driven by the need for uncorrelated strategies in a volatile market. With UBP's performance data, Blackhorn ensures regular updates and insights for investors, targeting an annualized return of 8-9%.


This collaboration marks UBP's first distribution tie-up with an external asset manager in Hong Kong, reflecting our shared commitment to delivering innovative investment solutions.

Mr. Thomas Perazzi, Deputy Chairman, Head of Watches, Asia of Philipps Watches also talked about watch investment and tips. This mingling session provided a unique opportunity to explore exquisite whiskies while gaining insights into investment strategies to navigate the evolving challenges of the world economy.

title: A Toasts to 3 Years of Excellence in Family Office Services
body:
A Toasts to 3 Years of Excellence in Family Office Services

  • Aug 23, 2024
  • 1 min read

Blackhorn Wealth Management, a leading provider of comprehensive family office services, is proud to celebrate its 3rd anniversary this month. Since its founding in 2021, the firm has firmly established itself as an innovative force in the family office and high-net-worth wealth management space.


Over the past year, Blackhorn’s exceptional capabilities and client-centric approach have been widely acclaimed within the industry. The firm was recognized by UBS GFIM as an "Outstanding Business Partner”, by LGT Private Banking as a "Top Valued Business Partner" and showcased by InvestHK, a department of Hong Kong Special Administrative Region (HKSAR) Government, in their “Horn of Plenty” case study.


"We are honoured to be celebrated by our peers for the value we deliver to our clients," said Blackhorn's founder and CEO, Yugi Lee "These recognitions are a testament to the talent and dedication of our team, who work tirelessly to provide our family office clients with unparalleled service and sophisticated wealth management solutions."


To mark this important milestone, Blackhorn hosted a celebratory anniversary event, bringing together the firm's staff, advisors and interns. The evening was filled with laughter, entertainment, and heartfelt tributes to Blackhorn's journey thus far.


We will continue to light the way forward as we remain committed to setting the standard of excellence of what's possible in the family office space.

title: Asian Private Banker - DPM 2025 Leaders conversation
body:
Asian Private Banker - DPM 2025 Leaders conversation

  • Mar 25, 2025
  • 1 min read

Blackhorn's founder Mary Chiu participated as a panelist at Asian Private Banker’s 2025 Discretionary Portfolio Management Leaders Conversation. This exclusive, in-person event brought together leading professionals in wealth management from across the Asia Pacific region.


Mary joined MSCI’s Head of Greater China HeongWee Chong to discuss the future of Discretionary Portfolio Management (DPM) in APAC, focusing on transparency, technology, and personalization. The forum addressed the growing demand for tailored portfolios and explored how advancements like generative AI can enhance client experiences and drive performance.

Mary

title: From salaries to startups: Inspiring journeys of Hong Kong’s female EAM founders
body:
From salaries to startups: Inspiring journeys of Hong Kong’s female EAM founders

  • Mar 11, 2025
  • 1 min read

Yugi Lee, co-founder of Blackhorn Wealth Management, highlights the firm's rapid growth and commitment to the independent advisory model. Founded in 2021, Blackhorn has expanded to a team of 35, driven by the appeal of External Asset Managers (EAMs) offering flexible and diverse solutions. She emphasizes the importance of collaboration and a flexible working policy, fostering trust and profit-sharing among asset managers. With a focus on client needs and teamwork, Blackhorn continues to thrive in Hong Kong's financial landscape.

title: Blackhorn Wealth Management Named Best EAM in Hong Kong at the 2024 WealthBriefing Asia Awards
body:
Blackhorn Wealth Management Named Best EAM in Hong Kong at the 2024 WealthBriefing Asia Awards

  • Oct 4, 2024
  • 1 min read

Updated: Oct 30, 2025

We are thrilled to announce that Blackhorn Wealth Management has been awarded the title of Best External Asset Manager (EAM) in Hong Kong at the prestigious 2024 WealthBriefing Asia Awards. This recognition highlights our commitment to excellence in wealth management and our dedication to providing exceptional service to our clients.


The WealthBriefing Asia Awards celebrate the achievements of firms that have demonstrated outstanding performance, innovation, and client service in the wealth management industry. Being recognized as the best EAM in Hong Kong is a testament to our team's hard work, expertise, and unwavering focus on delivering tailored solutions for our clients.


We extend our heartfelt gratitude to our clients and partners for their continued support and trust in Blackhorn Wealth Management. This achievement motivates us to continue striving for excellence and to enhance our offerings in the ever-evolving financial landscape.


Stay tuned for more updates as we continue to grow and innovate in the wealth management sector!

title: Blackhorn Group Enters New Era with Strategic Acquisition by CTF Services Limited
body:
Blackhorn Group Enters New Era with Strategic Acquisition by CTF Services Limited

  • Sep 3, 2025
  • 1 min read

Updated: Sep 4, 2025

Blackhorn Group Limited, a premier independent wealth management firm, is excited to announce that CTF Services Limited (CTFS, Hong Kong stock code: 659) has entered a conditional sale and purchase agreement to acquire a 65% equity interest in our company. This strategic partnership marks a transformative milestone, enhancing Blackhorn’s mission to deliver exceptional wealth solutions for high-net-worth families and professional investors across Hong Kong, Greater China, and beyond.


Since our inception in 2021, Blackhorn has grown organically to over 30 professionals, serving hundreds of clients with tailored wealth structuring and legacy planning. This collaboration with CTFS integrates our expertise with CTF Life’s insurance prowess and uSMART’s digital brokerage capabilities, creating a seamless, client-centric financial platform.


Mary Chiu, Co-Founder, stated, “This partnership amplifies our vision to lead in wealth management. With CTFS’s support, we access the Chow Tai Fook Group’s vast ecosystem, enhancing our offerings for clients.” Yugi Lee, Co-Founder, added, “This is a unique opportunity to redefine holistic wealth services in Asia.” Blackhorn is poised for dynamic growth, delivering unparalleled value to our clients.

title: Markets Group - 6th Annual Hong Kong Investors Forum
body:
Markets Group - 6th Annual Hong Kong Investors Forum

  • Nov 18, 2025
  • 1 min read

Alan Lee, our Head of Investment Strategy at Blackhorn Wealth Management, was honoured to represent the Blackhorn team at the 6th Annual Hong Kong Investors Forum (Markets Group) — an unforgettable event of leading voices from pension funds, insurers, family offices, private banks, and asset managers.


Alan took the stage to moderate one of the key panel discussions on challenges and opportunities in the current fixed income markets with key experts, Gordon Tsui, CFA, Geoffrey Lunt, Matthew Byer and Vincent Chung. It was truly exciting to have this close dialogue session to dive deep into the current fixed income landscape, uncovering game-changing strategies for portfolio positioning in this vital asset class.

body:
Capital 資本平台 CEO of the Year

  • Dec 13, 2022
  • 1 min read

Updated: Dec 16, 2022

Congratulations to Yugi Lee who was an honouree at the 'CEO x Entrepreneur Nite 2022' and 35th Anniversary gala organised by Capital 資本平台 on 8 December. The awards ceremony recognises industry leaders and elites for their contributions to Hong Kong's economic development, corporate governance and social responsibility.


Ms. Lee is the recipient of the CEO of the Year award. "I am truly honoured for this recognition alongside such remarkable leaders in Hong Kong. This award could not have been achieved without the support and partnership of co-founder, Mary Chiu⁩, and the amazing team at Blackhorn Wealth Management. I would also like to thank our clients for their trust in our platform. It has been a challenging year for wealth management, but these are the times when true opportunities flourish. The partnership and trust from our stakeholders are at the core of our achievements, so for that, I am deeply grateful."

title: Elevating Operational Excellence: Andy Yuen Joins Blackhorn as COO
body:
Elevating Operational Excellence: Andy Yuen Joins Blackhorn as COO

  • Feb 12
  • 1 min read

We are delighted to welcome Andy Yuen as Blackhorn's new Chief Operating Officer (COO)!

Andy brings over 30 years of distinguished leadership in Hong Kong’s wealth and finance sector, most recently as Managing Director and Senior Advisor at Bank Julius Baer, where he directed teams serving ultra-high-net-worth clients across Greater China.


His extensive background also includes senior roles at UBS as Managing Director and Market Team Head, and leadership positions at Goldman Sachs PWM and Citibank.



In his role as COO, Andy will have oversight on Blackhorn’s entire operations and compliance function. Andy’s appointment underscores Blackhorn’s commitment to strengthening our platform with professional operational integrity and client-focused solutions.

title: Citywire Independent Wealth Symposium 2024
body:
Citywire Independent Wealth Symposium 2024

  • Nov 8, 2024
  • 1 min read

Blackhorn Wealth Management Managing Director, Alan Lee, participated as a guess speaker at the Citywire Independent Wealth Symposium 2024. The event washeld on November 7th, 2024, at the American Club in Hong Kong.


Citywire’s symposium, tailored for Hong Kong-based independent wealth firms, focused on the industry’s growth prospects and key priorities as we approach 2025. The event brought together a select group of family principals, wealth managers, and investment decision-makers from single/multi-family offices, IAMs, and EAMs across Asia, fostering an environment ripe for networking and insightful discussions.


Alan shared his expertise on the evolving landscape of independent wealth management, emphasizing innovative strategies and the importance of a client-centric approach in today’s dynamic market. His insights highlighted Blackhorn’s dedication to thought leadership and our commitment to excellence in financial services.


The symposium was a vibrant exchange of ideas and innovations, providing an excellent platform for leading independent wealth firms in the region. We were thrilled to engage with our peers and contribute to the forward-thinking dialogue that will shape the future of our industry.

The article explores Blackhorn's unique approach to serving ultra-high-net-worth individuals and families, emphasizing its independence, client-centric philosophy, and comprehensive family office services.


Mary Chiu, Co-Founder of Blackhorn Wealth Management, shared insights into the firm's growth, strategic partnerships, and commitment to setting new benchmarks in the industry. Chiu also reflected on her professional journey, from her early education to her current leadership role, offering a glimpse into the experiences that have shaped her career in finance. The article celebrates Blackhorn's vision for the future, emphasizing its role in shaping the wealth management landscape in Asia.

In January 2024, in partnership with Blackhorn Wealth Management, UBP launched a new hedge fund solution. 

 

“The new partnership with Blackhorn will be our first-ever distribution deal with an external asset manager in the city, and we will monitor clients’ sentiment closely before new strategies,” Kier Boley, co-head and CIO of alternative investment solutions (AIS), UBP.

 

The partnership provides Blackhorn’s clients exclusive access to high quality and buy rated alternative funds by UBP Asset Management, with an AUM of USD16Bn in alternatives.

title: Blackhorn 4th Annual Dinner Party
body:
Blackhorn 4th Annual Dinner Party

  • Aug 26, 2025
  • 1 min read

Updated: Sep 2, 2025

Blackhorn Wealth Management, a prominent player in family office and high-net-worth wealth management since its founding in 2021, marked significant milestones in 2025, with a focus on a transformative acquisition that positions the firm for future growth. The following details key events and developments specific to 2025, building on the firm’s third anniversary celebration in 2024.


Blackhorn’s exceptional capabilities and client-centric approach earned significant accolades in 2025. The firm was recognized by Julius Baer Private Bank as an “Exceptional Intermediate Partner” and, for the second consecutive year, by UBS Global Wealth Management as an “Outstanding Business Partner,” underscoring its consistent excellence. Complementing these achievements, Blackhorn reinforced its prominence in the wealth management sector by engaging with key industry insights, as highlighted in the Independent Wealth Power Players 2024 edition. This publication explores the dynamic external asset manager (EAM) and multi-family office (MFO) industry in Asia Pacific, featuring

insights from 30 EAMs on their five-year strategies, portfolio mandates, AUM growth, technology plans, and key challenges. Further solidifying its industry presence, Blackhorn participated in the Asian Private Banker Summit on October 8, 2024, in Hong Kong and the Asian Private Banker’s Awards for Distinction 2024. At the prestigious gala dinner, attended by Asia’s private banking and wealth management leaders, Blackhorn earned a "Highly Commended" distinction for Independent Wealth Manager.


We will continue to guide the path forward, dedicated to upholding the highest standards of excellence in the family office space.

body:
Charity Movie Night Co-hosted with CTF Charity Foundation

  • Nov 17, 2025
  • 1 min read

Updated: Nov 18, 2025

Blackhorn Wealth Management Limited was privileged to co-host an impactful charity event alongside CTF Charity Foundation, Iridium Capital Limited, and Jing Yuan Charity Foundation, in support of Charles 萧俊, a cherished member of the finance community. Charles has been courageously battling Amyotrophic Lateral Sclerosis (ALS) for over a decade, and the event aimed to raise funds to support his ongoing medical and family needs.


Thanks to the generosity of our participants and the overwhelming support from the community, the event was a resounding success, raising significant funds for this meaningful cause. We extend our heartfelt gratitude to CTF Charity Foundation for their remarkable contribution, matching every ticket sold. 


We sincerely thank everyone who contributed in any way to this vital cause.

title: On Air at Metro Broadcast - 理財通天下
body:
On Air at Metro Broadcast - 理財通天下

  • Jul 22, 2024
  • 1 min read

4 July 2024


Metro Broadcast once again invited our Founder and CEO Yugi Lee to join them live on air to share emerging trends in the Family Office space. The general public has an growing interest to understand the role family offices play in preserving and growing wealth across generations while upholding the values of each family.

 

Hong Kong has established itself as a global centre for wealth management and family offices. The city's robust financial infrastructure, low tax regime, and proximity to the rest of Asia makes it an attractive destination for high-net-worth individuals and families to manage their assets and investments.  As Asia's wealth continues to expand, Hong Kong is well-positioned to solidify its role as a leading destination for wealthy individuals and families to manage their finances and legacies.

title: Geopolitics, Asia Focus, and Active Risk Management in a Shifting Global Order
body:
Geopolitics, Asia Focus, and Active Risk Management in a Shifting Global Order

  • Feb 23
  • 1 min read

Insights from Alan Lee, Managing Director, Blackhorn Wealth Management

Asian Private Wealth Investment Outlook 2026


As global markets enter 2026 marked by heightened geopolitical tensions, accelerating technological transformation, and diverging regional fundamentals, Blackhorn Wealth Management continues to anchor its investment philosophy in active risk management and Asia‑focused opportunity capture.


In a recent interview with Hubbis for the Asian Private Wealth Investment Outlook 2026, Alan Lee, Managing Director, shared Blackhorn’s latest perspectives on market opportunities, portfolio construction, and the strategic themes shaping the firm’s approach to private wealth management in the coming year. Lee outlined a distinctly Asia-led and actively managed investment approach shaped by geopolitical realignments, technological acceleration, and evolving regional fundamentals.


Against an increasingly complex global backdrop, Blackhorn emphasises defensive positioning, selective thematic exposure, and disciplined active allocation as core pillars for private wealth portfolios in the year ahead.


Read the full piece on Hubbis: 

https://lnkd.in/gipVXH6H

Blackhorn Wealth Management has been recognised by Capital with the “2022 Capital Excellence in Multi-Family Office Award” at the 13th Annual Merits of Achievements in Banking and Finance Awards.


The ceremony was hosted by the publication on 2 September and marks the first time that this achievement category for multi-family offices has been recognised. In recent years, multi-family offices have been gaining in popularity throughout Hong Kong and Asia due to their flexibility and efficiency compared with their single-family office counterparts. In particular, Blackhorn Wealth Management offers clients access to institutional-grade investment opportunities by leveraging their expansive network and expertise across multiple financial platforms.

body:

  • Sep 9, 2022

Blackhorn Wealth Management is pleased to announce the appointment of Alan Lee as Managing Director and Head of Investment Solutions. With over 15 years of international wealth management experience, Lee brings expertise in foreign exchange solutions and complex financial products to diversify portfolio risk for sophisticated clients.


In his new role, Lee will manage ultra-high-net-worth clients’ portfolios and drive the development of investment strategies and solutions across the firm. title: CSUITE-XCHANGE Interview with Yugi Lee
body:
CSUITE-XCHANGE Interview with Yugi Lee

  • Sep 1, 2022
  • 1 min read

Yugi Lee sat down with CSUITE-XCHANGE to discuss the story of Blackhorn and her path from private banker to entrepreneur. She explains the growing importance of EAMs in Asia and how they provide a competitive edge to investors that is unique from private banks.


"External Asset Managers (EAMs) is very well established in Europe and the USA but not in Hong Kong and other Asian countries. However, we can see the model of EAMs has been rapidly expanding in Hong Kong and Singapore in recent years. Traditional investors in Hong Kong and Asian regions were keen on maximum control of assets and normally wealth management was dominated by banks. As Asian investors become more sophisticated, particularly for younger generations who are well educated."

title: 2022 WealthBriefingAsia External Asset Management Awards
body:
2022 WealthBriefingAsia External Asset Management Awards

  • Oct 13, 2022
  • 1 min read

Blackhorn Wealth Management is the proud recipient of two honours at the inaugural WealthBriefingAsia External Asset Management Awards 2022, highlighting the importance of EAMs to the wealth management industry in Asia. A panel of independent judges from across the private wealth management industry was invited to take part in deciding the awards. Panel judges include veterans from Julius Baer, Bank of Singapore, VP Bank, Lombard Odier, among others.


Within the Pan-Asia categories, our firm has been recognised as the winner of the Newcomer award, and within the Regional Categories, recognised as the winner of the EAM Based in Hong Kong award.


Led by co-founders, Mary Chiu and Yugi Lee, our team attended the awards ceremony on Thursday, 13th October at the Mandarin Oriental in Singapore. We couldn’t be more thrilled to have accepted two awards this year at this prestigious event. We sincerely thank WealthBriefingAsia and the esteemed panel of judges for creating this opportunity to recognize EAMs in Asia.
